Since the announcement, which took place in a collective WeVerse stream, the BTS Army has been celebrating the news on social media.
Many fans have shared deep emotions about the reunion, which comes after all of the members completed their mandatory military service in South Korea.
In March 2022, BTS announced an extended hiatus, which made time for V, Suga, Jin, Jungkook, RM, Jimin, and J-Hope to complete their mandatory military service in South Korea and pursue solo endeavors as musicians.
Jin was the first to enlist in December 2022 and the first to be discharged last June.
Ultimately, they have influenced the stories I tell, the music I aspire to create.” In early June 2025, RM and V completed their service, followed by Jungkook and Jimin."},{"url":"https://news.pollstar.com/2025/07/01/bts-reunite-announce-plans-for-2026-world-tour/","title":"BTS Reunite, Announce Plans For 2026 World Tour - Pollstar News","content":"After taking a break due to requirements in completing their service periods for the South Korean military, BTS is returning and announced plans for a new album and a world tour set for 2026.
The band reunited in a Weverse livestream on July 1 for the first time since all seven members completed their military service requirements.
Fans have been waiting for the band’s return since Jin first enlisted in December 2022.
On April 15 and 16, they wrapped their last tour at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas, the shows selling 100,420 tickets, grossing $18 million.
The tour kicked off on June 28 and 29 with dates at Goyang Auxiliary Stadium in Goyang, Korea."},{"url":"https://www.biography.com/musicians/a65628178/bts-history-hiatus-reunion","title":"BTS: All About the Group’s Reunion, New Album, and 2026 Tour","content":"- Now, BTS is reuniting once more and planning to release a new album and launch a world tour in 2026.
The South Korean boy band, which has been on hiatus since 2022 as its members pursued solo projects and completed mandatory military service, are ramping up to release a new album and embark on a world tour next year.
